mechanism: EBITDA addbacks inflate reported leverage metrics, causing systematic underestimation of default probabilities. True leverage 1.5-2x higher shifts median B-rated 5-year PD from ~3.5% to ~8-14%, creating a wedge between market-implied and fundamental default rates.
regime_dependence: Always present but magnitude increases in late-cycle when addbacks are largest and realization rates decline during economic weakness
